problem: I have two 20-sided dice that each have 4 maroon sides, 7 teal sides, 8 cyan sides, and one sparkly side. If I roll both dice, what is the probability they come up the same?

classified_questions.question: What are the possible outcomes when rolling the two 20-sided dice?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How many maroon sides are there on each 20-sided dice? How does this affect the probability of getting maroon on both dice?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can both dice show teal? If so, what is the probability of this happening?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Are there any teal sides on the dice that could match with each other? How does this affect the probability of getting teal on both dice?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What about cyan? How many sides are there for cyan on each dice? What is the probability of getting cyan on both dice?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Is there a side that is unique to both dice? What are the chances of both dice showing this unique side?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How can we calculate the overall probability of the two dice showing the same outcome?
classified_questions.label: b
